title: File:MS_Westerdam_heaving_up_its_anchor_in_Half_Moon_Cay.JPG
description: MS Westerdam heaving up its anchor in Half Moon Cay, Little San Salvador Island, Bahamas.  The Westerdam flies the Dutch flag and bears IMO number 9226891.

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by the operator (or operator-supervised agent), 2026-05-14
visual_verification.note: Close-up at Half Moon Cay; "Holland America Line" and "WESTERDAM" lettering visible on hull
